svg.title: MPP current overall architecture
svg.desc: Current architecture for multi-platform-poster, showing clients, Traefik, Next.js frontend, WXT extension, Go backend API, publish worker, publisher adapters, collaboration service, AI service, Rust content pipeline service, browser worker, browser runtime, external publishing platforms, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker Compose, observability, LLM providers, and external services.
svg.text: A service topology view of the current repo: web workspace, extension handoff, API orchestration, async publishing, collaboration, AI editing, browser runtime, state stores, and observability.
User-facing entry points and edge routing
Dashboard, editor, AI review, API proxy
Authenticated API boundary, durable publication workflow, and platform adapter split
Go 1.26, Echo, GORM, JWT, OpenAPI contracts
Auth, dashboard, accounts, AI proxy, browser and collab session APIs
Consumes jobs, owns locks and retries, writes final status
WeChat, X, Zhihu, and Douyin adapter implementations
Services kept outside the Go business API to preserve focused runtime boundaries
Content edit, prepublish edit, calibrate, streaming responses
MediaAssetProcessor is called by backend media path
PlatformDraftCompiler is exposed as gRPC capability
Session pool, streams, cookies, login detection
Runtime, External Boundaries, And Data Stores
Durable state, transient coordination, browser execution, external platform targets, model providers, and operations
Users, projects, accounts, publications, sessions, Yjs
Jobs, locks, OAuth state, stream tokens, TTL state
Xvfb, Openbox, x11vnc, noVNC, CDP proxy
API, OAuth, cookie, browser, or extension-injection flows
Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Alloy, service metrics, Docker logs
Provider URL, model, API key from env
SMTP, OAuth providers, public media URLs
